reviews.review_description: Amazing

Easily the best fishing experience you can buy. But I’m not convinced more can’t be done... as real as it looks and feels, after quite a bit of play time it just feels like theres not much left to do.. not a very helpful critique as i dont have a recommendation but.. thats the reaction after playing it for a while. 
( Buy the game if you are on the fence...im just nitpicking..it is well worth $10 compared to some of these Go games)

developer_response.body:
Hi SlimKitty2,

Thanks for the feedback! FYI, we are planning to deploy Multiplayer Co-op / PvP, 5 saltwater fishing spots with new tackles and more by the end of this year. Please stay with us and watch how we improve the game along the way.

reviews.review_description: So relaxing and a total escape from the rat race. Not really into fishing in reality but love this game this is truly what vr was made for am looking forward to more places to fish as I've maxed out the xp level and caught some big fish and some rare fish which I have adorned my tank with. Love this game, one of the best I've played so far on the go.

Best fishing game out there. I love how you can fish and listen to music or watch YouTube while you fish. Well worth the 10 bucks if anything you should charge more. Just need to add more fishing spots from around the world. But either way it's a great game

developer_response.body: Thank you killstreak4206 for playing Real VR Fishing! It is great to hear how much you are enjoying fishing with utilizing the features within the game! FYI we do plan to update regions in North America, however this is getting delayed due to COVID-19, and we will be on it once it is over! Happy Fishing! :)

reviews.review_description: I’ve spent a lot of time in my hammock just chilling, and fishing, thanks! Why not allow us to fish right off of the deck at the lodge as well. I’d be happy to pay for more places in which to fish...

developer_response.body:
Hi Xebu,

Thanks for your feedback. We are planning to let players to fish at the deck and that is why it is not blocked. 😊 New countries will be offered as DLC later on. We are looking at South East Asia and North America atm. ICYMI, there are 5 more sea fishing spots are coming as an update around October including multiplayer.

reviews.review_description: An absolutely fantastic experience......both relaxing and exciting......great graphics....  I’m looking forward to the future of this game

developer_response.body: Thank you Coatsie99 for playing Real VR Fishing! We will always be thinking and present out what is best experience and play for you! FYI, Multiplayer will be coming this summer so stay tuned! Thank you for the support, Happy fishing! :)

reviews.review_description: This is how Oculus Go games should look. Really shows the potential. Now lets do a monster hunter version
I love this game so much because it’s realistic and you can get stuff and build your gameplay by catching fish.(the thing I love)
Perfect!
Good game could use better picture quality that’s all

You would be doing yourself a disservice by owning a Go and not purchasing this game.

Buy it. Now.

What a great game! The only problem I had was it didn’t last long enough lol I beat it in a few days. I’ll still play it but would like to see new levels come out for it. Maybe some deep sea fishing, something a little more exciting.

developer_response.body: Thank you TwitchyDbby for playing Real VR Fishing! Its awesome to see you have enjoyed the game, FYI our next update will be multiplayer scheduled to be this summer! Thank you for the support and Happy Fishing! :)

reviews.review_description:
This is such a lovely game!  I haven't gone fishing in real life in years because my Dad won't bring me; he gets mad that I let all the fish go, lol.  Now I can go fishing again.  I find this so relaxing and peaceful, especially since right now it's winter and snowy in my part of the world.
Dev's, will you be adding Canada to the map? That would be so awesome.  We have some beautiful, remote, pristine lakes here, with moose, bears, raccoons, otters, etc.  Would be lovely to see. 
My 80 year old Dad is going to love it; he's going to test this out tomorrow.
Thank you devs, for a lovely game.

I love the game BUT there is a small bug that occurs quite often that I would like fixed: when you cast your line out one direction, it would often go the complete opposite direction. It drives me crazy. If you could fix it that would be awesome
I just bought this game and It won't work
Needs spots all over the world tho!

developer_response.body: Thank you Ericshmer for enjoying RVRF! FYI, we do plan to update regions in North America, but this is getting delayed due to COVID-19. We will be on it once it is over! Until then, Happy Fishing! :)

reviews.review_description: Should be 5 stars but I’ll change my review if they add any United States fishing spots other than that pretty solid game no complaints and this is being played on the oculus go. I can only imagine how much better it would be on a quest worth 10$. If your in to fishing

This game is relaxing and fun to play. I especially enjoy how when you keep your fish you can put them in your Large Fish Tank in your house to see them. 
I also like how there are a lot of different types of reels, rods and tackle to purchase and use. The only problem I have is that when you cast, it doesn’t go where I want it to sometimes.

developer_response.body: Thank you ThomasD141 for playing Real VR Fishing! It is great to hear you are liking the variety of equipment that is available and enjoying fishing to decorate your large fish tank for your Lodge! Thank you for the feedback about the cast, I will pass it to the team! Happy Fishing! :)

reviews.review_description: Fun game, addicting to play, & incredible graphics. A good download and worth the money!

developer_response.body: Thank you BeyondMyMeans for enjoying Real VR Fishing! It is our pleasure that you enjoy the experience from the game. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This app is incredible!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you Tony-Yikes for enjoying Real VR Fishing! :)
